title: Link sub items to an existing parent progress bar
excerpt: I can see that if you select “show summary progress on parent item” on teh sub items progress it will create a new parent progress bar in the main item, however i want to link teh subitem progress to an existing parent p…

posts.author: JadeLouise (JadeLouise)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can see that if you select “show summary progress on parent item” on teh sub items progress it will create a new parent progress bar in the main item, however i want to link teh subitem progress to an existing parent progress bar. How do i do this please? I don’t want to add another parent progress bar when there already is one recording the progress of items in the board.

Thanks

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

The main way to do this would be to use the subitem roll-up, as you described. You could replace the progress bar you have with this subitem progress roll-up.

However, if this doesn’t work for you, perhaps you could use a Battery Widget or other type of progress bar widget in a Dashboard (or Dashboard View) and select both subitems and items to be shown.

Let me know what you think!

posts.author: elizabeth.l (Elizabeth)
posts.cookedHtml: I had a similar question, but my issue is that only some of my items have subitems. So if I use the subitem progress roll-up some of my items are blank because they don’t have subitems. So I either have two columns for progress, or have a lot of blanks. Is there a way to address this?
